tools.name: read_me
tools.description: Returns the Excalidraw element format reference with color palettes, examples, and tips. Call this BEFORE using create_view for the first time.

tools.name: create_view
tools.description:
Renders a hand-drawn diagram using Excalidraw elements.
Elements stream in one by one with draw-on animations.
Call read_me first to learn the element format.

tools.name: export_to_excalidraw
tools.description: Upload diagram to excalidraw.com and return shareable URL.
